ab: rengay driya dra i manay kakuwa ta kanu.
i Uking Tatiyam ku ngalad, muketrep ku ami garem.
ch: B:我叫 Uking Tatiyam，我今年10歲。
en: My name is Uking Tatiyam, and I’m 10 years old.

ab: i manay nu ngalad?
i Uking Tatiyam ku ngalad.
a walrak yu kana isuwa na maunan?
en: What ethnic group are you from?

ab: a walrak ku dra Pinuyumayan.
a Inanuwayan peniya mu trau i sabak?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎？
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: aiwa, a Pinuyumayan mi sarumaenan.
ch: B:是的，我們全家都是卑南族人。
en: Yes, my whole family is Pinuyumayan.

ab: a Inanuwayan peniya mu trau i sabak?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎？
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: amelri, a Pinuyumayan i namalri, a Pairang i nanalri.
ch: B:不是，我的爸爸是卑南族，我的媽媽是漢人。
en: No, my father is Pinuyumayan, and my mother is Han Taiwanese.

ab: tu walrak yu kan manay?
tu walrak ku kan Sakay Tatiyam.
i temama idriyu? munuma lra tu ami?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎？他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: makanemen lra tu ami.
i temama idriyu? munuma lra tu ami?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: amelri, naniyam maaidrangan i drekalr taytaw, makawalu lra tu ami.
ch: B:不是，他是我們部落的耆老，他80歲了。
en: No, he is an elder of our tribe. He is 80 years old.

ab: munuma lra tu ami kan bau na mainayan?
muketrep misama dra waluwa tu ami kan baelri na mainayan.
maramaidrang kanu dra sadru i bau na mainayan?
ch: A:你哥哥年紀比你大很多嗎？
en: Is your brother much older than you?

ab: kasedean mi dra lruwatra ami.
munuma nu ikaasatr?
saleman misama dra makapetelr sekiyan ku ikaasatr.
paetreng ta lra adri marepanau, asatr yu lra?
ch: A:好久不見，你是不是長高了？
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. Have you grown taller?

ab: aiwa a! saleman miasma dra makatelun sekiyan ku ikaasatr.
ulane yu lra?
adri, pamelri nu ninauwan!
idriidriwan yu lra?
adri, ulane ku lra.
ulane yu lra?
aiwa, makatelun kilo ku lra garem.
